known_issues.description: Metal-dependent rendering pipeline crashes immediately on non-Metal hosts
known_issues.reproduction_steps: Launch application. Crashes within 2 seconds with Metal initialization failure.

known_issues.description: AVFoundation media pipeline unavailable — no video decode/encode
Requires Apple-specific media codecs unavailable on Linux

notes: Unexpected failure/regression. Application requires Metal GPU support and Apple-specific media framework infrastructure that is fundamentally incompatible with the current platform. Marked broken rather than unsupported because the failure is at runtime rather than architectural classification.
